meta.title: Vantage — Your job hunt, run by agents
meta.description: Drop your résumé in. AI agents find the right roles, tailor every application, draft your answers, and prep your interviews — you review and hit submit.

quota.label: Auto-applies
quota.paceRunOut: at this rate you'll run out {weekday}
quota.fullBody: Manual applies still work — or upgrade for unlimited agent runs.

language.title: Language
language.desc: Choose the language Vantage speaks to you in. Your résumé and cover letters still follow the language of the role you're applying to.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: Your account details. Read-only for now.

jobPrefs.title: Job preferences
jobPrefs.desc: What Vantage matches against. The closer this is to reality, the better your daily briefing.
jobPrefs.targetRolesPlaceholder: e.g. Senior Product Designer — press Enter
jobPrefs.skillsPlaceholder: e.g. Figma, Design systems — press Enter
jobPrefs.locationsPlaceholder: e.g. Remote, New York — press Enter

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.desc: Help future job-seekers without exposing yourself. Off by default.
privacy.donateTitle: Donate anonymised interview questions to the shared pool
privacy.donateBody: When you log a real interview, Vantage strips company / personal identifiers and contributes the question text to a pool that helps other users prep for the same round. Your résumé, answers, and outcomes never leave your account. You can turn this off at any time and any previously donated questions stay in the pool — past contributions are anonymised, so we can't pull a specific one back.

data.title: Data
data.desc: Export or permanently delete everything Vantage holds about you.
data.exportDesc: Downloads a JSON file with your profile, all résumé versions, and every application Vantage holds for you. No server-side queue — generated on the spot.
data.deleteDesc: Permanently erases your résumés, applications, interviews, and profile. This cannot be undone.

deleteModal.title: Delete your account?
deleteModal.body: This permanently deletes all your data. Type <token>DELETE</token> to confirm.

scene_recreation.name: Scene recreation
scene_recreation.tagline: Crowd-sourced intel and a single sharp follow-up. Closest to a real round.

pressure_drill.name: Pressure drill
pressure_drill.tagline: JD-grounded questions, chained follow-ups until you stick a landing.

warm_up.name: Warm-up
warm_up.tagline: No intel, gentle pacing. Use before a real round when you need momentum.

rapid_fire.name: Rapid fire
rapid_fire.tagline: No intel, no follow-ups — single-line feedback per answer. Highest reps.

gallery.title: Pick how you want to rehearse.
gallery.subtitle: Each mode is a different way to practise for a real round.

intel.title: What this round actually asks.
intel.subtitle: Pulled from the crowd-sourced question bank and public signals. We drill the likely ones first.
intel.style: Conversational. Stripe weighs craft and written communication heavily — expect a follow-up take-home, not a live exercise.
intel.q1: Walk me through a project you're proud of.
intel.q3: How do you handle disagreement with engineering?
intel.trapQ: Tell me about a time a design of yours failed.
intel.trapNote: Easy to over-hedge here. Own it plainly, then show the correction with a number.

live.sampleHeard: Confident, but they're listening for the decision you made — not just the outcome.
live.sampleStuck: Stuck on impact — next time, lead with the metric in one sentence.

debrief.title: Your interview card.
debrief.subtitle: How each answer read from the other side of the table — and what to carry into the real round.

heard.0: Confident framing, but they're listening for the decision you made — not the outcome.
heard.1: Clear on what happened. The trade-off you weighed against could be named earlier.
heard.2: Honest about the tension. Naming the metric you optimized for would land harder.
heard.3: Strong narrative. The follow-up will probe what you'd do differently — be ready.
heard.4: Closed well. One concrete number in the first sentence would have anchored it.

debrief.closeLoopBody: After the real {company} screen, come back and log what they actually asked. Vantage learns your real weak spots — not generic advice.
debrief.focusNext: Owning impact, naming the metric early

confirm.heading: {mode} — about {mins} min, {count} questions.
confirm.timerNote: Once you start, the timer runs. You can exit at any time — your answers won't be saved if you cancel.

logReal.title: Log what {company} actually asked
logReal.body: We'll open Ask Vantage so you can walk through the real round while it's fresh. Pick one — you can change it later in Settings.
logReal.justForMeBody: — questions stay on your account. We never share or aggregate them.
logReal.helpPoolBody: — same as above, plus we anonymise the questions (no name, no company, no role details) and add them to a shared bank so others get a closer mock next time. You can opt out any time.
logReal.handoffPrompt: I just finished the real {company} interview. Let's log the actual questions they asked so Vantage can sharpen my next prep.

review.skillsMatched: {count, plural, one {# skill} other {# skills}} matched
review.skillsAligned: {count, plural, one {# skill} other {# skills}} aligned
review.externalRole: This role lives on an external site. We'll prep your package in the extension when you open it there.
review.reasonsLineUp: {count, plural, one {# reason} other {# reasons}} it lines up
review.amberBlocks: The amber blocks were written for you — glance before you send.
review.coverNoteHint: Click to edit — this is your voice, adjust anything.
review.blocksReady: {count, plural, one {# block ready} other {# blocks ready}}
review.writtenByAi: written by AI — glance before you send

redirectNotice.text: Please sign in to open your workspace.

hero.subhead: Just tell Vantage what you want. Its agents find the right roles, tailor every application, draft your answers, and prep your interviews — you review and hit submit.
hero.microcopy: No card to start · Your data can stay on your device

steps.title: From “I need a job” to submitted — in a handful of clicks.
steps.subtitle: One calm loop that gets smarter every time you use it. No spray-and-pray. No filling the same form twice.

items.title: Bring yourself in
items.body: Drop a résumé, paste it, link a profile — or just chat. No forms to fill.

items.title: Get matched
items.body: Agents scan live roles and rank real fits. Quality, not a thousand long-shots.

items.title: Review the package
items.body: Tailored résumé, cover note, and answers — AI parts marked for a quick glance.

items.title: Submit it yourself
items.body: The form fills in your own browser. You press submit — zero account risk.

items.title: Prep & track
items.body: Everything lands on a board. Got an interview? A mock is one tap away.

chat.body: Vantage is one conversation. Behind it, a team of agents quietly does the work — updating your résumé, tailoring an application, filling a form, launching a mock interview. You stay in one place and stay in control.
asks: "Find me product design roles under $200k, remote."
"Rewrite my résumé to lead with impact."
"Start the Stripe application and draft the answers."
"Run a mock interview for tomorrow's Stripe screen."

chatMock.title: Ask Vantage
chatMock.userMessage: Tailor my résumé to the Linear role and start the application.
chatMock.reply: On it — running two agents now.
chatMock.result: Your Linear application is ready — 94% match, 2 fields drafted by AI.
chatMock.composerPlaceholder: Ask anything, or launch a task…

features.title: Six agents. One career context that keeps growing.

items.title: Résumé studio
items.body: Build and refine by conversation. Every version saved — write once, map everywhere.

items.title: Honest AI optimize
items.body: Sharpens how your real wins read — quantifies, tightens, never invents.

items.title: JD-tailored apply
items.body: One job description in, one tailored résumé + cover note + answers out.

items.title: Client-side autofill
items.body: Fills ATS forms in your browser, on your login. You always submit yourself.

items.title: Mock interviews
items.body: A live AI interviewer that follows up and coaches you after each answer.

items.title: Market & flywheel
items.body: Daily trends plus a personal interview vault that gets richer the more you use it.

bets.title: Built the opposite way to every mass-apply bot.

items.title: Quality over quantity
items.body: Applying to 11–20 roles converts 3× better than blasting 100+. We help you go narrow and excellent — not spray and pray.

items.title: Client-side = zero ban
items.body: Filling and submitting happen in your browser, your login, your IP. Platforms can't tell human from assisted. Your account stays safe.

items.title: Your context is the moat
items.body: Autofill gets copied. Your résumé history, applications, and interview answers don't — they compound into an assistant that truly knows you.

pricing.title: Start free. Upgrade when it's working.
pricing.footnote: Every plan: your data can stay on your device · you always submit applications yourself · cancel anytime

prompt.fillGapsIntro: My résumé parse left a few gaps. Please ask me one question at a time so we can fill them in:

originalPane.label: ORIGINAL

suggestions.subtitle: AI proposals — accept to fold into your optimized version.

original.label: ORIGINAL

compare.body: Open a tailored variant to see what AI added vs your master.
compare.diffBody: AI-tailored segments are highlighted in coral. Anything unchanged is your master résumé.

rawFallback.badge: Couldn't structure — here's what we saw
rawFallback.body: Vantage saved your upload, but the AI couldn't map it into résumé fields. The original text is below — use Ask Vantage to walk through it section by section, or upload a cleaner file.
rawFallback.empty: (Empty file — no text could be extracted.)

parse.doneDetail: Saved as a new version. Open the timeline on the left to review.

warnings.title: AI couldn't fully structure your résumé — your text is saved as v1.

source.fetchError: Couldn't fetch the original — the file may have been removed or storage is offline.
source.previewUnsupportedBody: Inline preview only works for PDFs. Use the download button above to open the original in your editor.

presentation.compareDisabledHint: Pick an optimized or tailored version on the left to compare it with the original.

editor.dirtyCount: {n, plural, one {# unsaved edit} other {# unsaved edits}}

builder.title: Résumé studio

builder.livePreview: Live preview · updates as you talk

builder.targetSenior: Targeting senior IC roles — leading with craft depth, project ownership, and measurable outcomes.
builder.targetDefault: Open to senior IC and lead roles — positioning for both depth and breadth.

tracker.interviewingBanner: You have {count, plural, one {# active interview} other {# active interviews}}. Click Prep this interview to launch a mock.

empty.interviewing: When a recruiter replies, the conversation moves to this column.
empty.outcome: Offers and closed loops settle here.

delivery.title: You submit · we prepare
delivery.body: Vantage tailors your résumé, drafts the cover letter, and pre-fills the form — but the final Submit click happens in your browser, under your login, on your IP. Zero risk of bot-detection, no stored ATS passwords.

drawer.statusHelp: Moves the card between columns. The change saves immediately; if it fails, the previous status comes back.
drawer.outcomePlaceholder: e.g. signed offer, closed at recruiter screen…
drawer.outcomeHelp: Narrative for what actually happened. Saved on blur.
drawer.coverPlaceholder: Paste or write the cover letter you sent…

notice.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
notice.sessionTimeout: Couldn't reach the server. Please try signing in again.

plan.pro: Continue to start your 7-day Pro trial.

error.rateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment before trying again.
error.rateLimitSeconds: Too many attempts. Please wait {seconds} seconds before trying again.

onboarding.heroSubtitle: Drop your résumé in. We find the roles, tailor each application, and prep you for every interview — you stay in control.
onboarding.privacyNote: Password never stored · your data can stay on your device

upload.title: Drop your résumé to begin
upload.hint: PDF or DOCX · or click to browse

chat.title: No résumé? Build one by talking.
chat.desc: Answer a few questions and we'll draft a strong résumé from scratch.

link.comingSoon: Link import is coming soon — for now, upload a file or paste your résumé text.

banner.running: Reading your experience from {file} — keep exploring, this runs in the background.
banner.done: Résumé ready{name}. We're matching it against open roles now.
banner.failed: {reason} You can re-upload from onboarding anytime.

dock.title: Ask Vantage anything
dock.body: The dock on the right is always here — find roles, tailor a résumé, prep an interview. Send a chip to fire it instantly, or write your own.

today.title: Today's matches
today.body: Fresh roles scored against your résumé, with the strongest fit at the top. We refresh this every morning.

apps.title: Track every application
apps.body: Drafts, submissions, interviews, outcomes — all in one place. Status updates land here automatically.

extension.whyPlaceholder: Tell us what draws you to this role…
extension.filledMessage: I filled 4 fields from your profile — name, email, phone, and a tailored answer below.

_common.unknownBody: We hit an unexpected error. Please try again, or copy the reference below if it keeps happening.

failed.title: Check the highlighted fields
failed.body: One or more inputs need a small fix before we can continue.

formatUnsupported.title: We can't read that file
formatUnsupported.body: The file format isn't supported, or the file is corrupted. Try a PDF or DOCX export.

payloadTooLarge.title: That's a bit too large
payloadTooLarge.body: The upload exceeds our size cap. Try compressing the file or splitting it before uploading again.

required.title: Please sign in to continue
required.body: This page needs you to be signed in. Sign back in and you'll land right back here.

invalidCredentials.title: Couldn't sign you in
invalidCredentials.body: That email and password combination doesn't match our records.

sessionExpired.title: You've been signed out
sessionExpired.body: For your security we sign you out after a period of inactivity. Sign in again to keep going.

forbidden.title: You don't have access to this
forbidden.body: This action isn't available on your account. If you think that's wrong, reach out.

emailNotVerified.title: Check your email
emailNotVerified.body: Confirm your email address to finish setting up your account.

notFound.title: We can't find that
notFound.body: The item you're looking for has moved or was removed. Try refreshing the list.

conflict.title: Something changed in the meantime
conflict.body: Another tab or device updated this item. Refresh to see the latest version, then try again.

gone.title: That item has been removed
gone.body: It was deleted and can no longer be accessed.

limited.title: Too many attempts
limited.body: We're protecting your account from automated abuse. Please wait {seconds, number} seconds and try again.

exceeded.title: You've hit your quota
exceeded.body: You've used up the requests allowed on your current plan. Upgrade or come back when your quota resets.

unavailable.title: A service is having a moment
unavailable.body: One of the services Relay depends on isn't responding. We'll retry — usually back in a few seconds.

timeout.title: That took longer than expected
timeout.body: The server didn't answer in time. Check your connection and try again.

dbUnavailable.title: We're having a brief hiccup
dbUnavailable.body: Our database is taking a moment to respond. We'll retry automatically — usually back in a few seconds.

cacheUnavailable.title: We're degraded but still up
cacheUnavailable.body: Our cache is offline so things may be a touch slower than usual. You can keep going.

internal.title: Unexpected error
internal.body: Something went wrong on our side. We've recorded it — please retry shortly, and copy the reference below if it keeps happening.

unavailable.title: Reasoning engine is offline
unavailable.body: Our LLM provider is temporarily unreachable. Most of Relay still works; try this action again in a moment.

budgetExhausted.title: Your session budget is used up
budgetExhausted.body: You've hit the per-session budget for AI work. Reach out and we'll lift it.

contentRefused.title: We blocked that one
contentRefused.body: Our model declined to answer this prompt. Try rephrasing without sensitive or restricted content.

fabricationBlocked.title: Stopped before inventing experience
fabricationBlocked.body: We blocked this draft because it would have added claims that aren't in your résumé. Edit your source résumé first if those claims are real.

timeout.title: That step took too long
timeout.body: The agent ran past the time we give it for one turn. Try again — it's usually faster on the second go.

interruptPending.title: Waiting on your approval
interruptPending.body: Vantage paused so you can review what it wants to do next. Approve or edit in the dock to continue.

taskFailed.title: That step failed
taskFailed.body: An agent step couldn't finish. Try again — if it keeps failing, copy the reference and reach out.

offline.title: You appear to be offline
offline.body: Check your connection and try again.

blocked.title: Your network is blocking Relay
blocked.body: A proxy, VPN, or browser extension may be intercepting requests. Add localhost to your proxy's bypass list and try again.

versionStale.title: A newer version is available
versionStale.body: Reload the page to pick up the latest changes.
